textify(LMe||(LMe=(0,Ce.Z)(["You stagger forward as you double over in pain as your water breaks. Your vagina starts to dilate to help with the passing of your child. [var0|You make haste to your room, your codex alerting you that you're giving birth. Thankfully, your ship is equipped with a med bot that quickly comes to your aid.|[var1|Flushed at the timing you make your way as fast as you can to a bathroom, the med-kit bot at the wall automatically activates as you get in a stall and lock the door.|You curse at yourself for not making yourself stay at a safe place, but it's too late now. You quickly find a place that's as safe as it can be out here. You lay down on the ground and get ready for the oncoming child.]]
		
	The next several hours pass in a blur, at times seconds feeling like hours and other minutes passing in a blink of an eye. By the end of it, you're red in the face and your body is still aching with tears running down your face, but you have a newborn kui-tan pup in your lap. You bring the small mewling child to your [pc.chest], your child eagerly drinking deeply from your chest.
	
	You brush their still damp fur, sliding a finger over their cheek. It's small hand grabs around your finger, holding tight, making "," coo. You'd love to play with your child more, you have to get them to the nursery, and the bot is already on its way. You play and nuzzle with them as much you can in the little time you have, and all too soon, the bot arrives. You place your child inside the protective chamber of it, and give "," a gentle kiss on the forehead before the robot takes off, making you hug your chest tightly, the irrational feeling of abandoning your child tearing at your heart, but they're safe in the nursery, and you can't wait to go see them there."])),t===_Me.d.MALE?"him":"her",t===_Me.d.MALE?"him":"her"),[function(){return InShipInterior()},function(){return InRoomWithFlag(r.tb.PUBLIC)}]
Next
blockHeader("Birthing!")
ERROR: 'Lah Pregnancy Ends' Status Effect does not exist.
Next
Pain in your gut bends you over and fluid spills
into your [pc.lowerUndergarment]
onto the deck
onto the ground
. Alarm grips you as you feel your cervix dilate. With as much calm as you can muster, you consider the best course of action.
\n\nAs quickly as you can, you waddle into your room, switch the auto-medkit on in the bathroom, carefully place yourself on the bed
, rip off your [pc.gear]
and spread your [pc.thighs], biological imperative virtually ordering you what to do.

\n\nAs quickly as you can, you waddle into the nearest restroom, grab the medkit drone off the wall (frontier bathrooms are thankfully readily equipped for this sort of thing), lock yourself in a cubicle and spread your [pc.thighs], biological imperative virtually ordering you what to do.

\n\nGroaning at the timing, you shed your [pc.gear] and position yourself the best you can in the inhospitable and non-hospital-able terrain. The wish that you’d stayed somewhere indoors and safe hums through your thoughts like a mosquito, but there’s no helping it now -- you’ll have to deliver on your own.
\n\n
The medkit drone monitors your pulse and places a large sheet beneath your thighs, instructing you to bear down rhythmically with soft, wordless beeps.

Spasms wrack your pregnant body for the next hour, and your mind almost shuts down from the pain, operating on biological autopilot. There’s no relief when the first baby finally emerges via one gigantic clench, wailing heartily, none at all - because you know, from the weight and wriggling in your womb, that that’s simply one of two.
The drone hovers down, snipping the umbilical cord and cradling the child to one side whilst you grit your teeth and bear down again.
You grit your teeth and bear down again.

\n\nAt long last, in a sweaty daze of utter exhaustion, you’re looking down at your two, tiny children, curled up in your arms "+(pc.isLactating()?"nursing hungrily on your [pc.boobs]":"and blinking suspiciously at the world they’ve found themselves in")+". If you didn’t already know from the fact they’re twins, what they are is obvious from their floppy, isosceles ears and short, fluffy tails, twitching spasmodically as they "+(pc.isLactating()?"feed on their mother’s milk":"gaze around")+". Half-ausar puppies!
They’re both boys, their facial features a mirror image of each other.
They’re both girls, their facial features a mirror image of each other.
One is a boy, the other is a girl.
They both have their father’s coloration - tawny skin and the barest beginnings of sandy fur on their heads and tails.
They both have "+a[0].skinTone+" skin and the barest beginnings of "+a[0].furColor+" fur on their heads and tails.
One has "+(a[0].NumMale>0?"his":"her")+" father’s coloration - tawny skin and sandy fur - and the other has "+a[1].skinTone+" skin and "+a[1].furColor+" fur.
One has "+(a[1].NumMale>0?"his":"her")+" father’s coloration - tawny skin and sandy fur - and the other has "+a[0].skinTone+" skin and "+a[0].furColor+" fur.
One has "+a[0].skinTone+" skin and "+a[0].furColor+" fur, and the other has "+a[1].skinTone+" skin and "+a[1].furColor+" fur.

\n\nYou spend a little time with them, cleaning them and playing with their cute pointed toes and brushing their nascent fur, drawing little whinnies and whines out of them, tiny paw-hands touching your face. Eventually, though, reality intrudes. With a heavy heart, you call up the incubation drone, which arrives altogether too fast, and carefully load the pair of them up. You watch the shuttle disappear, comforting yourself with the knowledge that you’ll be able to see them again soon at the Nursery.
\n\n
